home.title:
Didap.
Free the monkey.
home.intro: A studio of software craftspeople: we design, write and ship bespoke digital products, from foundations to final polish.
home.team_intro: Three full-stack engineers, one designer, one project manager. All in-house.

work.title: PROd by Didap
work.intro: Products we design, build and ship on our own. For design, for cities, for markets.

clients.title: Our partners
clients.intro: Clients and strategic partners we build alongside, working on products and long-term collaborations.

about.title: Didap, in two lines.
about.intro: Five of us: three full-stack engineers, one designer, one project manager. Independent software craftspeople.
about.body_1: We work full-stack for real — backend, frontend, infrastructure, mobile, integrations. No outsourcing on what matters: the code we ship is written, tested and run by us.
about.body_2: Design lives inside the code: built to actually ship, not just look good in slides. Products grow through real use, not the perfect brief.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.intro: If you have a project in mind, write to us. We answer everyone — even just to say no.
contact.info_scope: We work on bespoke products, native apps, internal SaaS and management platforms, and websites.
contact.info_ethics: We only take on projects we believe in — ethically, creatively, humanly. If we say no, no offence: everyone does what feels right.

form.name: Name
form.project_type: What do you have in mind?
form.funding_legend: Have you thought about the budget?
form.funding_need: I'd like advice on public funding
form.qube_description: The Qube is a MIMIT-certified business incubator. They help startups and SMEs access calls, grants and subsidised finance. We don't deliver that ourselves: we handle the technical side of your project, they handle covering the cost.
form.message_placeholder: A few lines about the project, draft is fine.
form.consent: I agree to the data processing as per the
